Guys, I realized that it's almost going to be February and I haven't exported anything, and what happened is that I didn't remember that my university this year decided to enter in January and not in February as was customary, so I was quite busy with enrollment, but the good points are that it gave me ideas to rewrite several bots.

I don't promise to upload one daily since I realized that many times you don't get to enjoy the initial bot because you want to see the second one so I'm going to limit myself to reuploading the bots per week, the new ones are going to be raised but I'll try to reupload the bots on Saturdays.
